restaurants.name: Figlmüller Bäckerstraße
restaurants.note: Famous for its enormous Wiener Schnitzel

restaurants.name: Zum Wohl
restaurants.note: Excellent Austrian wine bar with cold cuts and cheese

restaurants.name: Trattoria Milanese
restaurants.note: Classic Milanese cuisine since 1933, try the risotto alla Milanese

restaurants.name: Luini
restaurants.note: Famous street-food spot for panzerotti (fried dough pockets)

hotels.name: Hotel Sacher Wien
hotels.note: Iconic luxury hotel, home of the original Sachertorte

airbnb.name: Airbnb Navigli District
airbnb.note: Stylish apartment in the trendy canal district

highlights.name: Schönbrunn Palace
highlights.note: UNESCO World Heritage baroque palace with formal gardens

highlights.name: The Last Supper
highlights.note: Leonardo da Vinci's masterpiece, book well in advance

highlights.name: Duomo di Milano
highlights.note: Gothic cathedral with rooftop terrace views
